overall.description: A vehicle drives through a dystopian suburban shantytown in Cyberpunk 2077 during golden hour. The camera passes makeshift residential buildings, a Mark 24 convenience store, digital billboards, and approaches a railroad crossing in this desolate, warm-lit environment.

events.description: Mark 24 convenience store comes into view on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily down the center of a deserted two-lane road through makeshift residential areas

entered.detail: wooden power poles with transformers and multiple wire strands lining the road
low-rise makeshift buildings with corrugated metal roofs and satellite dishes
concrete block buildings with weathered walls and debris in yards
two-story commercial building with large illuminated yellow and green signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a deserted suburban shantytown during golden hour, with makeshift residential buildings lining both sides of the asphalt road. Wooden utility poles with power lines run along the right side. The Mark 24 convenience store appears on the left, its illuminated signage standing out against the warm sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open suburban road transitioning to commercial area

events.description: Mark 24 store passes out of view behind the vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward through the deserted residential area

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertising screen with colorful graphics visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues past the Mark 24 store, which disappears behind as the road stretches forward through more residential shacks. In the distance, a digital billboard begins to appear on the right side, signaling a transition to a more commercial or industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area with commercial signage and guard structures

events.description: digital billboard becomes prominent on the right side of the road
guard tower structure becomes visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving forward past commercial signage and approaching a guarded area

entered.detail: elevated watchtower with antennae and observation platform

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the large digital billboard on the right, which displays bright advertising graphics. A guard tower emerges on the left side of the road, suggesting a checkpoint or controlled area ahead. The residential shacks give way to more open space and industrial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad crossing approach with industrial buildings

events.description: railroad crossing gates and warning signals come into view directly ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under the railroad crossing gates

entered.detail: railroad crossing barrier with X-shaped warning signs and signal lights
low industrial structures with metal fencing and corrugated walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a railroad crossing, with the warning gates and signals becoming prominent directly ahead. Industrial buildings appear on the right, replacing the residential shacks. The guard tower passes behind as the vehicle continues toward and under the railroad crossing structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate suburban shantytown that gradually transitions into a controlled industrial zone. It begins by driving past makeshift residential buildings and wooden utility poles under a warm golden hour glow, passing an illuminated Mark 24 convenience store on the left. As the store recedes, the road stretches forward through more shacks before a large, bright digital billboard emerges on the right, signaling a shift toward a commercial area. The scene then opens up as the residential structures give way to a guard tower on the left and industrial elements on the right. Finally, the camera approaches and passes under a railroad crossing, with warning gates and signals becoming prominent as the vehicle enters the industrial sector.
